sentences.text: The builder used bricks to make a ___ between the kitchen and the bedroom.
sentences.hint: A vertical structure that divides or surrounds a room

sentences.text: Rain and snow fall on the ___ at the top of the house.
sentences.hint: The structure covering the top of a building

sentences.text: We walk on the ___ inside the house — this one is made of wood.
sentences.hint: The flat surface you stand on inside a building

sentences.text: The ___ is made of glass and lets sunlight into the room.
sentences.hint: An opening in a wall, covered with glass, that lets in light

sentences.text: Each red ___ is rectangular and made from clay baked in an oven.
sentences.hint: A small block of baked clay used for building walls

sentences.text: He put the ___ against the wall and climbed up step by step to the roof.
sentences.hint: A piece of equipment with steps, used for climbing up and down

sentences.text: He used an electric ___ to make small round holes in the wall for the screws.
sentences.hint: A tool that spins to make holes in hard materials

sentences.text: Water travels through a metal ___ from the tank to the tap.
sentences.hint: A long tube that carries water or gas

sentences.text: The ___ is made of copper and carries electricity from the switch to the light.
sentences.hint: A thin piece of metal that carries electrical current

sentences.text: The builder mixed grey ___ powder with sand and water to hold the bricks together.
sentences.hint: A powder that becomes hard when mixed with water, used to join bricks

sentences.text: He held the ___ in one hand and hit the nail into the wood with it.
sentences.hint: A heavy tool with a handle, used for hitting nails

sentences.text: The small metal ___ went into the wood when he hit it with the hammer.
sentences.hint: A thin pointed piece of metal that you hit into wood to join things
